analysis_population.exclusion_rule: reuse the frozen Record160 excluded_no_successful_source rule exactly; no post-hoc exclusion is allowed

authoritative_input.description: production current_rules final_returned stage after rerank Top-20 window and category gate

encoding.jsonl: one canonical JSON object per UTF-8 line with LF terminator
encoding.text_boundary: public API display protection is a declared deterministic transform; authoritative null and identity states remain distinct
encoding.unicode: preserve Unicode code points through JSON and JSONL round-trip

identity.query_identity: opaque SHA-256 label derived only for diagnostics

frontend_display.unsafe_url_behavior: disable clickability without deleting the result or mutating the authoritative URL

jsonl.round_trip: line-by-line JSON parse and Pydantic validation

validation_invariants: production reconstruction exactly matches frozen final_returned for all included queries
every eligible export preserves query result count, stable identity membership, and order position by position
paper fields never move across result identities and declared null, empty, and missing states remain distinguishable
pagination and default limits never drop, pad, or duplicate an authoritative result
frontend keys are stable result identities and are unique within every query
unsafe URLs alter clickability only and never mutate result membership or the authoritative URL digest
the production default remains original_index_v1 and explicit v2 audit inputs cannot silently replace it
all supported round trips reconstruct one identical contract digest
an absent production export is reported as unsupported_export instead of being simulated
snapshot tree remains unchanged and no network, LLM, evaluator, or quality path is used
warnings: This gate verifies delivery fidelity only; it does not establish relevance, Precision, Recall, F1, or an official score.
The machine-readable sample is a contract example, not an official competition submission or inferred scorer schema.
Unsupported or legacy-ineligible exports remain explicit and are not counted as passed.
